source_evidence.snippet: Owner lab observation reports ASUS RT-AC86U Rescue Mode accepting macOS and Swift TFTP WRQ uploads in octet mode at 192.168.1.1, with the Mac using 192.168.1.10/24.
source_evidence.notes: Personal testing source; no final approval. Hardware version and broad firmware applicability are unknown.

source_evidence.snippet: Multiple local RT-AC86U observations showed upload completion was followed by about a 3 minute wait, manual power cycle, DHCP reconfiguration, and use of the DHCP gateway for Web UI access.
source_evidence.notes: Post-upload power-cycle requirement is an observed behavior and should be shown as a prominent warning.

button_recovery.led_indicator: Power LED slow flashing indicates Rescue Mode; in some phases power LED may be off while LAN LED remains on.

tftp_details.client_behavior_requirement: Follow the server ACK source port. In observed RT-AC86U Rescue Mode runs, ACKs stayed on port 69, so the client continued sending to port 69.

post_upload_behavior.user_warning_after_upload: Upload completion does not mean the router is immediately reachable. Wait about 3 minutes, manually power cycle the router, set the Mac back to DHCP, then use the DHCP gateway IP as the admin URL.

known_recovery_variants: Factory-reset-like or configuration-lost state after recovery

review_notes: Incoming draft from Owner-provided lab observation. Do not promote to reviewed/final without human review and artifact/source assessment. Hardware version and broad firmware applicability remain unknown.
notes: ASUS RT-AC86U lab observations show standard TFTP WRQ/octet upload with router-side TFTP server behavior, fixed ACK source port 69, and a post-upload manual power-cycle requirement after about 3 minutes. Ping and the previous LAN IP are not sufficient failure signals.
known_issues: Broad firmware version applicability is unknown.
Configuration may be retained or reset; both outcomes were observed.
Post-upload manual power cycle was required in observed local runs.
Initial macOS Local Network permission denial can appear as sendto() No route to host.
risk_warnings: Upload completion does not mean recovery is complete. Wait about 3 minutes before judging the result.
Observed RT-AC86U runs required unplugging and reconnecting power after upload before normal recovery.
Configuration retention is not guaranteed; both retained and factory-reset-like outcomes were observed.
Do not judge failure only by ping response or by the previous LAN IP.
